mapper.sql: select id, name, type, status, publish_time, start_time, end_time, vote_entry_key, qr_code_url, archived, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, remark from Activity
mapper.update: update Activity set status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = sysdate() where status in ('PUBLISHED', 'VOTING') and end_time is not null and end_time <= sysdate() and exists ( select 1 from ActivityVoter av where av.activity_id = Activity.id ) and not exists ( select 1 from ActivityVoter av where av.activity_id = Activity.id and av.status != 'DONE' )
update Activity set status = 'VOTING', updated_at = sysdate() where status = 'PUBLISHED' and start_time is not null and start_time <= sysdate() and (end_time is null or end_time > sysdate())
mapper.insert: insert into Activity(name, type, status, publish_time, start_time, end_time, vote_entry_key, qr_code_url, archived, created_by, created_at, remark) values(#{name}, #{type}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{voteEntryKey}, #{qrCodeUrl}, #{archived}, #{createdBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: delete from Activity where id in #{id}
